heading: Set Minimum Oplog Window
body:
Modify the retention duration for oplog entries in the
[oplog](manual/reference/glossary) of the cluster. By default, Atlas retains entries
for 24 hours before the mongod removes them from the oplog.

This option corresponds to modifying the
[storage.oplogMinRetentionHours](manual/reference/configuration-options) configuration file option
for each mongod in the cluster.

To set the minimum oplog window:

- Verify that storage auto-scaling is enabled and that you didn't opt
  out of it. Atlas enables auto-scaling by default.

- Set the minimum oplog window to the desired value. If you don't set
  this value, Atlas retains oplog entries for 24 hours before the
  mongod removes them from the oplog.
